text: I feel a hushed curiosity and a sense of disorientation. The purple light pouring from the meeting room stirs a strange anticipation in me, as if something important is about to happen or has just ended. Moving into the next space, the bold letters and glowing screens provoke thoughts about progress, research, and the restless human drive to understand. The philosophical text about clarity and perception resonates with my mood—uncertain, contemplative, as if I am on the edge of discovering something just beyond my current understanding.
